calendar.matters:
Petition Fit Appointment Of Successor Trustee Ect.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Volante for Deanna Boyd and Monique Mervin (Co-Successor Trustees). Emmett Giurlani for and with Kent Robinson.

The Court stated that the Dennis' Estate needs to be probated. Ms. Volante stated that she will file the petition for probate and requested an accounting. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is withdrawn. Mr. Giurlani stated that Mr. Robinson got the first set of rents on October 1, 2010 and asked for authority to collect the rents for January and February so that he could pay people off and deed the property. The Court directed Counsel to work it out.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Fit Appointment Of Successor Trustee Ect.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Continued To Dec-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emmett Giurlani for William Moreton Kent Robinson. Vincent Boyd (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Giurlani provided case history, spoke of the Family dynamics and stated that he would withdraw as Counsel if it becomes a contested matter. Mr. Boyd requested a continuance to be allowed to seek Counsel. The Court stated that it was inclined to deny the petition, that the property needs to go to Dennis and that probate for Dennis needs to be established to receive property from Angela (Dennis' Mother). The matter was continued to December 14, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
